title: MOFSimplify stability proxy route

expected_files.purpose: Local notes on provenance, download date, and preprocessing decisions.
Optional normalized structure index linked to CoRE-MOF entries.
Normalized MOFSimplify stability labels or mapped target table.
Explicit structure-label join mapping if identifiers differ.

blocking_questions: Can the label be mapped cleanly to a benchmark target?
Is the join between structures and labels reproducible?
